final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: interior-design-render
Asset type: editorial interior photo, portfolio-ready
Primary request: minimalist Scandinavian living room with clean lines and cozy atmosphere
Scene/backdrop: bright airy living room with large floor-to-ceiling windows, white plaster walls, light oak flooring
Subject: grey fabric sofa as central furniture piece, potted green plant, modern floor lamp with simple silhouette
Style/medium: photorealistic interior photography, Nordic minimalism
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, balanced symmetrical layout, natural sight lines toward window
Lighting/mood: soft natural sunlight streaming through large windows, warm and inviting, gentle shadows
Color palette: pure white walls, pale oak wood tones, muted grey sofa, fresh green plant accents
Materials/textures: matte plaster wall, smooth oak floor grain, woven fabric upholstery, ceramic planter, brushed metal lamp base
Constraints: maintain clean uncluttered aesthetic, emphasize natural light and material authenticity
Avoid: cluttered decor, heavy furniture, artificial lighting dominance, overly saturated colors, watermark
